items.title: Dbrand cancels Companion Cube because it didn’t actually ask Valve for permission
items.description: Dbrand announced Monday that it's refunding everyone who bought its Steam Machine Companion Cube, which it said it made "without a license from Valve." Dbrand announced the Portal-themed Steam Machine accessory in November and took preorders for it last Monday. But a few days later, the product had ...

items.title: Lawmakers want to ban AI companies from selling your health data
items.description: A new proposal would ban the sale of Americans' health and location information to data brokers - including information people reveal to an AI chatbot like ChatGPT or Claude.
